# Dendo

> Dendo is a hyperlocal food delivery and partner platform connecting customers with local restaurants, vendors, and delivery drivers across India.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://amazing-nougat-742e37.netlify.app/): Landing page with hero section, features overview, value propositions, and exclusive offers.
- [About Us](https://amazing-nougat-742e37.netlify.app/about): Company philosophy, mission, vision, and hyperlocal delivery approach.
- [Contact Us](https://amazing-nougat-742e37.netlify.app/contact): Contact form and business inquiry details.
- [Delivery Areas](https://amazing-nougat-742e37.netlify.app/delivery): Coverage map and list of active delivery zones.
- [Become a Vendor](https://amazing-nougat-742e37.netlify.app/vendor): Information and registration for restaurant and store partners.
- [Join as Driver](https://amazing-nougat-742e37.netlify.app/driver): Driver partner signup and benefits overview.
- [Request Zone](https://amazing-nougat-742e37.netlify.app/request-zone): Request Dendo service expansion to your area.

## Legal

- [Terms of Service](https://amazing-nougat-742e37.netlify.app/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://amazing-nougat-742e37.netlify.app/privacy-policy)

## Key Information

- **Company**: Dendo
- **Industry**: Hyperlocal food delivery, local commerce
- **Focus Areas**: Fast delivery, smart logistics, vendor partnerships, community-driven commerce
- **Coverage**: Cities across India
- **Mission**: To build India's most accessible hyperlocal commerce ecosystem
- **Vision**: To become the digital infrastructure powering local commerce across India
